chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA C. P. No.D-729 of 2024 Date of Hearing ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 04.06.2025. 1. For orders on M. A. No.1858/2025. 2. For orders on office objection. 3. For orders on withdrawal statement. 4. For hearing of M. A. No.2675/2024. 5. For hearing of Main Case. Mr. Abdul Rehman A. Bhutto, advocate for the petitioner. ------------------------ 1. Granted. 2 to 5. Learned Counsel submits that the grievance of the petitioners has been resolved and he under instructions does not wish to press this petition. Accordingly, the petition is dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. JUDGE JUDGE
